creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 2009-11-15 at 22:49 +0100, Marcin Wisnicki wrote:
> On Sun, Nov 15, 2009 at 22:14,  <gavin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> > Synopsis: query-pr.cgi does not display audit trail correctly
> >
> > State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> > State-Changed-By: gavin
> > State-Changed-When: Sun Nov 15 21:00:13 UTC 2009
> > State-Changed-Why:
> > Yes, replies to PRs need to begin with "Re: " and the PR number,
> > otherwise a new PR will be created.  The problem wit that PR was
> > unrelated to that: GNATS sometimes has problems with very long
> > subject lines.  I've joined the lines together and it now shows
> > correctly on the web.
> >
> 
> Thanks, now it is visible but there is a problem with quoted-printable
> encoded characters. Also I can't download second attachment
> (config.log.gz) - all I get is an empty response.

The second of those issues is known, and there is already a PR open
about it.  The first of them I'll take a look at soon - I've already
started fixing bugs in the script.

Gavin
